title: LEGENX121212'S ONESHOT REAPER
description: MACE TO ONESHOT SCYTHE {BTW I MADE THE TEXTURE}
body:
HELLO LEGENDZ, I AM BACK WITH ANOTHER TEXTURE PACK THAT IS NOTHING SHORT OF COOL.
THIS TEXTURE PACK CHANGES THE TEXTURE OF MACE TO A SCYTHE WHICH I LIKE TO CALL **_LEGENX121212'S ONESHOT REAPER_** 


# _**HOW TO USE**_
YOU CAN USE IT JUST LIKE A NORMAL TEXTURE PACK,BUT IF U ARE USING SODIUM THEN WHEN U LOAD THIS TEXTURE PACK, IT MAY SHOW THAT IT IS NOT COMPATIBLE BUT IT IS SHOWING THAT JUST FOR FUN BCOZ AFTER LOADING THE TEXTURE U CAN SEE THAT THE MACE CHANGES TO A SCYTHE.

THANK YOU 

**_AND ONE MORE THING_**

# **_"BEWARE OF THE ONESHOT REAPER BCOZ IT HAS ALREADY STARTED ITS HUNT YOU"_**

SPOILER!!!

DO NOT SCROLL AHEAD AS YOU WILL SEE THE TEXTURE CLEARLY
 
![THIS IS HOW AN ENCHANTED ONESHOT REAPER WOULD LOOK LIKE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58aedd03fcc4c3ea77a745f83fcf576c1d85c1ca.png)
